THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIXSON, KEISHA T. $1,967.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,998.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
